members.name: ConstraintVTable
members.comment: Defines a constraint table structure for validation; managed centrally, immutable after creation.

members.name: Constraint
members.comment:
Build a static ConstraintVTable for type T.
The returned value is typically stored as a comptime constant and referenced
by pointer from Accessor.  Supported types: int, float, bool, []const u8,
enum, optional, array, vector.

members.name: constraintSet
members.signature: fn constraintSet(T: type, allocator: std.mem.Allocator, typed_ptr: *T, input: []const u8) -> anyerror!void
members.comment: Validates and sets constraints for a Zig type with allocator and input data.

members.name: constraintGet
members.signature: fn constraintGet(T: type, allocator: std.mem.Allocator, typed_ptr: *const T) -> anyerror![]const u8
members.comment: Retrieves a value from a typed pointer using reflection, returning any error if failed.
